proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Welch test: mean `dependency_BRAF` was -0.8047 for `feature_009 == 1` (n=5574) versus -0.2495 otherwise; difference -0.5552.
Welch test: mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.6010 for `feature_022 == 1` (n=3880) versus -0.2524 otherwise; difference -0.3486.
Welch test: mean `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.6856 for `feature_024 == 1` (n=4890) versus -0.2535 otherwise; difference -0.4321.
Welch test: mean `dependency_KRAS` was -0.5594 for `feature_014 == 1` (n=11842) versus -0.2520 otherwise; difference -0.3075.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `feature_009 == 1` cell lines, `feature_011 == skin` further decreases `dependency_BRAF` beyond the additive effects of `feature_009` and `feature_011 == skin`.
Among `feature_022 == 1` cell lines, `feature_011 == brain` further decreases `dependency_EGFR` beyond the additive effects of `feature_022` and `feature_011 == brain`.
Among `feature_024 == 1` cell lines, `feature_010 == her2_enriched` further decreases `dependency_ERBB2` beyond the additive effects of `feature_024` and `feature_010 == her2_enriched`.
Among `feature_014 == 1` cell lines, `feature_011 == pancreatic` further decreases `dependency_KRAS` beyond the additive effects of `feature_014` and `feature_011 == pancreatic`.

analyses.result_summary: Two-predicate OLS interaction: skin/`feature_009` cell mean was -0.8114, but the interaction contrast was only -0.0126 (p=0.288); the large subgroup effect is explained by `feature_009`, not a robust skin-specific modifier.
Two-predicate OLS interaction: brain/`feature_022` cell mean was -0.6117; interaction contrast -0.0187 (p=0.223), so brain did not significantly amplify the `feature_022` EGFR signal.

Two-predicate OLS interaction: `her2_enriched`/`feature_024` cell mean was -0.7525; interaction contrast -0.0671 had nominal p=0.0372 but FDR q=0.841 in the systematic screen, so it was not treated as robust.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR screen context

analyses.result_summary: Two-predicate OLS interaction: pancreatic/`feature_014` cell mean was -0.5591; interaction contrast -0.0028 (p=0.795), indicating no pancreatic-specific amplification beyond the `feature_014` effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Higher standardized `feature_016` is associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores.
Higher standardized `feature_016` and higher standardized `feature_023` are each associated with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
Higher standardized `feature_016` is associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.

analyses.result_summary: Welch test: mean `dependency_RIT1` was -0.3527 for `feature_027 == 1` (n=4560) versus -0.2572 otherwise; difference -0.0955.
Linear regression with standardized `feature_016`: slope for `dependency_TMED10` was -0.0203 per +1 SD.
Linear regressions: `feature_016` slope for `dependency_DHX9` was -0.0218 per +1 SD (p=3.31e-44); `feature_023` slope was -0.0172 per +1 SD (p=5.41e-28).
Linear regression with standardized `feature_016`: slope for `dependency_POLR2A` was -0.0612 per +1 SD.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_028 >= 0.819` (the 75th percentile) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines below that threshold.
Cell lines with `feature_020 == 1` have less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_020 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Welch test: colorectal mean -0.7204 (n=5816) versus -0.2524 in other lines; difference -0.4680.
Welch test: `feature_035 == 1` mean -0.5447 (n=9285) versus -0.2526 otherwise; difference -0.2921.
Welch test: `feature_028 >= 0.819` mean -0.4694 (n=12508) versus -0.2526 otherwise; difference -0.2168.
Welch test: `feature_020 == 1` mean -0.2491 (n=6749) versus -0.3158 otherwise; positive difference +0.0667 indicates less dependency.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_011 == colorectal` and `feature_035 == 1` jointly make `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than expected from their additive effects.
`feature_011 == colorectal` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` jointly make `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than expected from their additive effects.
`feature_035 == 1` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` jointly make `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than expected from their additive effects.
`feature_020 == 1` suppresses the colorectal `dependency_KIF18A` effect, making colorectal/`feature_020 == 1` cell lines less negative than expected from additivity.

analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction: colorectal/`feature_035 == 1` mean -0.9425; interaction contrast -0.6822, FDR q=0.
Four-cell interaction: colorectal/`feature_028 >= 0.819` mean -0.9288; interaction contrast -0.6691, FDR q=0.
Four-cell interaction: `feature_035 == 1`/high-`feature_028` mean -0.7311; interaction contrast -0.4698, FDR q=0.
Four-cell interaction: colorectal/`feature_020 == 1` mean -0.2501, whereas colorectal/`feature_020 == 0` mean was -0.8255; positive interaction +0.5714 indicates strong suppression, FDR q=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The most dependent `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011 == colorectal` AND `feature_035 == 1` AND `feature_028 >= 0.819` AND `feature_020 == 0`, and this subgroup has much more negative scores than all other cell lines.

The otherwise KIF18A-sensitive subgroup with `feature_011 == colorectal` AND `feature_035 == 1` AND `feature_028 >= 0.819` is suppressed when `feature_020 == 1`, producing less negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than the rest of the dataset.

analyses.result_summary: Complete-rule Welch test: the `colorectal & feature_035 == 1 & feature_028 >= 0.819 & feature_020 == 0` subgroup had mean -1.2990 (n=2571) versus -0.2530 in all other lines; difference -1.0460.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, complete subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: Suppressed complete-rule test: the same colorectal/`feature_035`/high-`feature_028` context with `feature_020 == 1` had mean -0.2557 (n=562) versus -0.3074 in the rest; positive difference +0.0517 confirms loss of dependency.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, complete subgroup versus complement

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.
Higher standardized `feature_003` is associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` AND `feature_003 >= 0.428` (the 75th percentile) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

Cell lines with `feature_003 <= -0.412` (the 10th percentile) AND `feature_023 >= 6.33` (the 90th percentile) have less negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than expected from additive effects, suppressing dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Welch test: `feature_018 == 1` mean -0.3614 (n=8055) versus -0.2523 otherwise; difference -0.1091.
Linear regression with standardized `feature_003`: slope for `dependency_RPL11` was -0.0544 per +1 SD.

Combined subgroup test: `feature_018 == 1` AND `feature_003 >= 0.428` mean -0.3647 (n=7797) versus -0.2524 otherwise; difference -0.1123. The pair interaction contrast was -0.0372 but not significant (p=0.105).
analyses.method: Welch t-test plus OLS interaction check

analyses.result_summary: Systematic-screen interaction: `feature_003 <= -0.412` AND `feature_023 >= 6.33` had mean -0.1536 (n=326) versus -0.2707 otherwise; positive interaction +0.0793, FDR q=0.0407, indicates a suppressive rather than dependency-enabling combination.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR correction

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 0` AND `feature_016 >= 1.088` (the 90th percentile) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than expected from additive effects.
Cell lines with `feature_012 == 1` AND `feature_017 >= 4.292` (the 90th percentile) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than expected from additive effects.
Cell lines with `feature_011 == ovarian` AND `feature_002 <= 2.289` (the 10th percentile) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than expected from additive effects.
Cell lines with `feature_010 == her2_enriched` AND `feature_016 >= 0.964` (the 75th percentile) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than expected from additive effects.

analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction: `feature_009 == 0`/high-`feature_016` subgroup mean -0.2972 (n=4435), subgroup effect -0.0474, interaction -0.0641, FDR q=0.0264.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR correction

analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction: `feature_012 == 1`/high-`feature_017` subgroup mean -0.3150 (n=532), subgroup effect -0.0616, interaction -0.0638, FDR q=0.0421.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR correction

analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction: ovarian/low-`feature_002` subgroup mean -0.4014 (n=408), subgroup effect -0.0683, interaction -0.0721, FDR q=0.0402.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR correction

analyses.result_summary: Four-cell interaction: `her2_enriched`/high-`feature_016` subgroup mean -0.5358 (n=252), subgroup effect -0.1174, but interaction -0.0551 had FDR q=0.928; this is not a robust nonadditive modifier of the strong `feature_016` main effect.
analyses.method: OLS four-cell interaction contrast with FDR correction

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_010 == her2_enriched` AND `feature_014 == 0` makes `dependency_BRAF` less negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_011 == prostate` AND `feature_021 == 1` makes `dependency_EGFR` less negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_010 == her2_enriched` AND `feature_034 >= 4.93` makes `dependency_ERBB2` more negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_010 == her2_enriched` AND `feature_020 == 1` makes `dependency_KRAS` less negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_015 >= 12.4` AND `feature_033 >= 1.16` makes `dependency_RIT1` less negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_011 == colorectal` AND `feature_035 == 1` makes `dependency_KIF18A` more negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_009 == 0` AND `feature_016 >= 1.088` makes `dependency_TMED10` more negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_011 == ovarian` AND `feature_002 <= 2.289` makes `dependency_DHX9` more negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_010 == basal` AND `feature_030 == 1` makes `dependency_POLR2A` more negative than expected from additive effects.
In the systematic interaction screen, `feature_003 <= -0.412` AND `feature_023 >= 6.33` makes `dependency_RPL11` less negative than expected from additive effects.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic screen over 120 one- and two-sided feature predicates: top `dependency_BRAF` interaction contrast +0.105 had nominal p=0.0042 but FDR q=0.433, so it was not robust.
Systematic screen: top `dependency_EGFR` interaction contrast +0.0945 had nominal p=0.00533 but FDR q=0.486, so it was not robust.
Systematic screen: top `dependency_ERBB2` interaction contrast -0.121 had nominal p=0.000911 but FDR q=0.172, so it was not robust.
Systematic screen: top `dependency_KRAS` interaction contrast +0.0892 had nominal p=0.0175 but FDR q=0.727, so it was not robust.
Systematic screen: top `dependency_RIT1` interaction contrast +0.0653 had p=0.000215 and FDR q=0.0531, just above the 0.05 threshold.
Systematic screen: `feature_011 == colorectal` AND `feature_035 == 1` had interaction -0.682 and FDR q=0, the strongest robust heterogeneity signal in the dataset.
Systematic screen: `feature_009 == 0` AND `feature_016 >= 1.088` had interaction -0.0641, p=9.91e-05, FDR q=0.0264.
Systematic screen: `feature_011 == ovarian` AND `feature_002 <= 2.289` had interaction -0.0721, p=0.000157, FDR q=0.0402.
Systematic screen: top `dependency_POLR2A` interaction contrast -0.0847 had nominal p=0.00986 but FDR q=0.626, so it was not robust.
Systematic screen: `feature_003 <= -0.412` AND `feature_023 >= 6.33` had positive interaction +0.0793, p=0.000159, FDR q=0.0407, indicating robust suppression of RPL11 dependency.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The final best-supported `dependency_BRAF` subgroup is `feature_009 == 1`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_EGFR` subgroup is `feature_022 == 1`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup is `feature_024 == 1`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_KRAS` subgroup is `feature_014 == 1`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_RIT1` subgroup is `feature_027 == 1`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.

The final best-supported `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is `feature_011 == colorectal` AND `feature_035 == 1` AND `feature_028 >= 0.819` AND `feature_020 == 0`, with much more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_TMED10` subgroup is `feature_009 == 0` AND `feature_016 >= 1.088`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_DHX9` heterogeneity subgroup is `feature_011 == ovarian` AND `feature_002 <= 2.289`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.
The final best-supported `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup is `feature_016 >= 0.964`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines and no robust pairwise modifier.

The final best-supported `dependency_RPL11` dependency-enriched subgroup is `feature_018 == 1` AND `feature_003 >= 0.428` AND `feature_016 >= 0.964`, with more negative scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Final subgroup test: `feature_009 == 1` mean -0.8047 versus -0.2495 otherwise; difference -0.5552.
Final subgroup test: `feature_022 == 1` mean -0.6010 versus -0.2524 otherwise; difference -0.3486.
Final subgroup test: `feature_024 == 1` mean -0.6856 versus -0.2535 otherwise; difference -0.4321.
Final subgroup test: `feature_014 == 1` mean -0.5594 versus -0.2520 otherwise; difference -0.3075.
Final subgroup test: `feature_027 == 1` mean -0.3527 versus -0.2572 otherwise; difference -0.0955.
Final complete subgroup test: colorectal/`feature_035 == 1`/high-`feature_028`/`feature_020 == 0` mean -1.2990 versus -0.2530 otherwise; difference -1.0460.
Final subgroup test: `feature_009 == 0` AND `feature_016 >= 1.088` mean -0.2972 versus -0.2498 otherwise; difference -0.0474. The interaction was also FDR-significant.
Final subgroup test: ovarian/low-`feature_002` mean -0.4014 versus -0.3331 otherwise; difference -0.0683. The interaction was FDR-significant.
Final subgroup test: `feature_016 >= 0.964` mean -0.4972 versus -0.3928 otherwise; difference -0.1043. No pairwise modifier for `dependency_POLR2A` survived FDR.
analyses.method: Welch t-test plus systematic negative heterogeneity screen

analyses.result_summary: Final dependency-enriched subgroup test: `feature_018 == 1` AND `feature_003 >= 0.428` AND `feature_016 >= 0.964` mean -0.3966 versus -0.2633 otherwise; difference -0.1333.
